name: @anima-labs/cli
description: Official Anima CLI — Identity infrastructure for AI agents. Manage identities, email, phone numbers, cards, vault secrets, and runtime configuration.
author: Anima Labs <support@useanima.sh>

scripts.build:binary: mkdir -p binaries && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile binaries/anima-$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)-$(uname -m)
scripts.build:binary:all: mkdir -p binaries && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile binaries/anima-linux-x64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile binaries/anima-linux-arm64
scripts.build:checksums: cd binaries && shasum -a 256 anima-linux-x64 anima-linux-arm64 > checksums.txt
